properties.title: N5785/26 for None
properties.text:
From: 2026-05-08 06:00:00+00:00
To: 2026-05-31 21:00:00+00:00

AIRSPACE CLSD Within AREA:

455043N0362102E THEN CLOCKWISE ALONG ARC RADIUS 195KM

CENTRE (441800N0384100E) TO 432919N0405012E

THEN ALONG STATE BORDER TO 432307N0400030E-431119N0395459E-

431422N0394800E-440708N0383726E-441517N0380503E-442815N0374513E-

443246N0372001E-443834N0371004E-445042N0370207E-445523N0364727E-

445626N0363635E-455043N0362102E

CLOSURE NOT AFFECT:

- VIP FLTS AND SUPPORTING ACFT,

- SKED INTL AND DOM FLTS VIA ATS RTE AND SKED ARR TO/DEP FROM

  CIVIL AERODROMES.

- ACFT DETACHED TO ASSIST IN EMERGENCIES, NATURAL OR MAN-CAUSED,

  AND FOR OTHER TASKS, AND NON-SKED FLTS - ALL SUBJ TO COOR WITH

  FEDERAL PROTECTION SERVICE OFFICER IN SOCHI IN EACH CASE.
